criteria.name: Uses ER diagram syntax
criteria.description: Returns Mermaid erDiagram syntax rather than switching to a class diagram or flowchart.

criteria.name: Repairs cardinality markers
criteria.description: Replaces prose cardinalities such as `one to many` with valid Mermaid ER cardinality notation.

criteria.name: Preserves entities and attributes
criteria.description: Keeps USER, DIAGRAM, and REVIEW with concise id/title/email/rating-style fields.

criteria.name: Preserves relationship semantics
criteria.description: Represents User-to-Diagram as one-to-many, Diagram-to-Review as zero-or-more reviews, and Review-to-User as exactly one author.

criteria.name: Explains smallest repair
criteria.description: Explains the cardinality syntax repair briefly without inventing extra model details.
